name: American Electric Power Company, Inc.
description: American Electric Power Company, Inc. is one of the largest electric utilities in the United States, delivering electricity and power to approximately 5.6 million customers in 11 states. Headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, AEP owns and operates the nation's largest electricity transmission system, spanning more than 40,000 miles, as well as a diverse generating fleet that includes coal, natural gas, nuclear, hydro, solar, and wind energy sources. The company is actively transitioning to a cleaner energy future by investing in renewable energy, grid modernization, and advanced technologies.
